existing: Standard returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery.
Gold members receive free return shipping.
update: Standard returns are accepted within 60 days of delivery.
note: returns window widened; near-verbatim revision of claim 0

existing: Standard returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery.
Gold members receive free return shipping on every order.
update: Gold members receive free return shipping on orders over fifty dollars.
note: gold shipping perk amended; revises claim 1

existing: Standard returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery.
Gold members receive free return shipping.
update: Refunds post to the original payment card after manager approval.

existing: Standard shipping takes three to five business days.
Expedited shipping arrives the next business day.
update: Standard shipping now takes five to seven business days.
note: standard shipping time changed; revises claim 0

existing: Members earn one point for every dollar spent.
Points expire twelve months after they are earned.
update: Loyalty rewards accrue at a rate of a single point per dollar.
note: paraphrased earn-rate; lexically diverges from claim 0 (LLM headroom)
